title: Proceedings of the Inhouse Review Groundnut(inclulding GRU & Biochemistry)
abstract: Inhouse Review is an important event for the research programs, as it enable them to benefit from interdiscipline and intradiscipline interactions and to make a critical assessment of the accomlishments and short coming of the research program. It is a joint effort by the scientific community of the Institute to improve the quality of research, establish priorities and relevance, sharply focus the goals and fix the time schedule for their achievements. The present review is intended to look to the progress made in each of the project and to incorporate in work plans suggestions emerging durring discussion. The proceedings indicate the projects, discussion, discussion highlights, and recommendation
